## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit title (feat:, fix:, etc.)
- [ ] Authored by @Pratiyush only — no Co-authored-by lines
- [ ] Local quality gate green (format:check + lint + typecheck + test + build)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] No cross-tool imports introduced
- [ ] Docs updated where appropriate
- [ ] If this closes an Epic's last sub-issue, draft release notes attached
